description_en: Beech tree of Miyosawa is a natural monument classified as a monument (historic site, place of scenic beauty, or natural monument). It is municipally designated in Maebashi, designated on April 1, 1980. It is located at 三夜沢町354-1.

Beech tree of Oana is a natural monument classified as a monument (historic site, place of scenic beauty, or natural monument). It is municipally designated in Maebashi, designated on August 18, 1992. It is located at 柏倉町.

Jujube tree of Kongoji is a natural monument classified as a monument (historic site, place of scenic beauty, or natural monument). It is municipally designated in Maebashi, designated on March 21, 2001. It is located at 苗ヶ島町1147-2 金剛寺.

Konara oak of Omuro Park is a natural monument classified as a monument (historic site, place of scenic beauty, or natural monument). It is municipally designated in Maebashi, designated on March 29, 2011. It is located at 西大室町2142 大室公園.

Dance hall of Hotaka Shrine is a structure (village-designated important cultural property) classified as a tangible cultural property. It is village-designated in Showa Village, designated on March 22, 1979. It is located at 昭和村大字貝野瀬1132.

name_en: Carvings of the main hall of Chikato Shrine

name_romaji: Nagai Hakone Jinja no daidai kagura
name_en: Daidai kagura of Nagai Hakone Shrine
description_en: Daidai kagura of Nagai Hakone Shrine is an intangible folk cultural property (village-designated important intangible folk cultural property) classified as a folk cultural property. It is village-designated in Showa Village, designated on September 17, 1992. It is located at 昭和村大字川額2666.
